import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; export default function Profile() { const [userData, setUserData] = useState({ name: "", email: "", phone: "", vehiclenumber: "", password: "", }); useEffect(() => { // Fetch user data from localStorage or API (replace with API call if needed) const storedUser = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("user")) || {}; setUserData(storedUser); }, []); const handleChange = (e) => { setUserData({ ...userData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleUpdate = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const response = await fetch( `${process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL}/users/update`, { method: "PUT", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, body: JSON.stringify(userData), } ); const data = await response.json(); alert(data.message); localStorage.setItem("user", JSON.stringify(userData)); }; return (

Edit Profile

); }
